rejected_candidates.title: Counter exposes unrestricted state mutation
rejected_candidates.reason: `Counter.sol` is an isolated toy contract with a single public integer and no privileged logic, integrations, or assets at risk; public mutation is its entire observable behavior, so this is not a meaningful security finding.
